headerTitle: Senior AI Technical Lead  ·  The SSA Group  ·  Hospitality & Attractions Technology  ·  Remote
subjectText: Senior AI Technical Lead — The SSA Group (Remote) · $175K–$190K
intro: SSA Group runs food, beverage, retail, and entertainment operations across zoos, aquariums, science centers, and cultural venues nationwide. That’s operational hospitality at scale — and it’s my native domain. Twelve years as a GM running high-volume F&B, staff, and P&L ownership. Now I build AI systems for operations like this. The Technical AI Lead role is the intersection of both.
bullets: Operational hospitality domain — 12 years GM-level operations in high-volume F&B and hospitality environments: P&L ownership, 40–80 staff, multi-location scheduling, vendor relations, guest experience metrics. I understand the operational data and pain points SSA Group is building AI on top of — from the ground up.

AI systems in production — 14 live AI endpoints across 13 platforms: multi-model routing (Claude/GPT-4o/Gemini), tool use, MCP protocol, structured JSON output with Zod validation, human-in-the-loop gates. AI that changes operational state and triggers real workflows — not analytics dashboards.

Technical leadership without a team — architected, built, and deployed every engagement as the sole technical lead: REST API contracts, PostgreSQL schemas, auth systems, Docker + PM2 + Nginx infrastructure, and client-facing training. Ownership model required for a technical lead at an operationally-focused company building net-new AI capability.
matchNotes: Hospitality/attractions operations + AI engineering = rare combination. Will has both: 12yr GM + 14 production AI endpoints. Senior AI Technical Lead at SSA Group is the bridge role where both sides of the profile pay off simultaneously.
